title: metrosideros polymorpha var. prostrata
intro: Metrosideros polymorpha var. prostrata, also known as the Renga Renga, is a variety of the Metrosideros polymorpha plant, a flowering plant native to New Zealand. It has been used in traditional Maori medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The Renga Renga is valued for its potential health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, soothing respiratory issues, and providing relief from skin irritations. The plant is often prepared as a tincture or infused oil, and its leaves can be used in herbal teas or as a topical application.
